parents.subject: LU-18222 doc: update man page with lqa_quota_ops

commit.subject: LU-10482 tests: renumber sanity/56e[f-k] to avoid conflict
commit.message:
LU-10482 tests: renumber sanity/56e[f-k] to avoid conflict

There are two sanity test_56ca() tests, which exposed issues with
the naming schema in this set of subtests - that some test_56XX
subtests are in the "abc" sequence of tests, and others are in
the "post-xyz" sequence of tests and using "aa, ab, ca, ...".

Rename test_56ef*() through test_56ek() to test_56E[f-k]()
to avoid future naming collisions.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I3f08e48c5b735498afa53b1a36202a9ce83ebbe5
